name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual data entry causes reporting delays. We provide consolidated payroll reports instead of manual reconciliation.
problem_solved: Difficulty in consolidating payroll data from multiple providers for accurate reporting.
features: Data import from multiple payroll providers

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in consolidating payroll data from multiple providers for accurate reporting.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual data entry causes reporting delays. We provide consolidated payroll reports instead of manual reconciliation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data entry and reconciliation from multiple payroll systems.
must_have_features: Data import from multiple payroll providers

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual data entry causes reporting delays. We provide consolidated payroll reports instead of manual reconciliation.
